tasks.label: Build Release AAB Verify
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\morgane\Desktop\prev_col'; .\gradlew.bat --stop; .\gradlew.bat :app:bundleRelease --no-daemon --console=plain; Write-Host '===AAB_SEARCH==='; Get-ChildItem '.\app\build' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq '.aab' } | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-List
